summary: Good-quality recording of a raw, no‑frills Dead show highlighted by a standout China Cat Sunflower.
review: The reviewer rates this tape four stars, calling it the best copy they have of a solid performance from one of their favorite years. They appreciate the unpolished, "raw nasty" band sound and single out China Cat Sunflower as a highlight, noting the recording sounds clean to their ears.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review praises both the performance and the audio quality; limited data gives moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes it as the best copy they own and says it sounds good to their ears, implying clear and well‑balanced sound despite no explicit source details.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing or set structure were provided.
